description_long: This is a single-story bungalow with a rectangular footprint, featuring a dark gable roof and white exterior walls. The main building is accompanied by a detached garage with a matching roof and a driveway connecting the two structures. The front facade includes a central entrance with a small overhang, flanked by several windows with blue shutters. The rear of the bungalow opens onto a patio area, visible as a tan surface adjacent to sliding glass doors. The property is set on a green lawn with a paved driveway and a small fenced area near the garage. The overall design is simple and modern, with clean lines and minimal ornamentation.
description: A modern, single-story bungalow with a dark gable roof, white walls, blue shutters, and a detached garage connected by a driveway. The property features a patio, green lawn, and minimalistic design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, blue-shuttered windows, and the detached garage with driveway.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the length of the bungalow, the gable roof, and the alignment of the garage behind the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the patio area, sliding glass doors, and the open lawn space between the house and garage.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the garage in the foreground, the rear patio, and the side of the bungalow.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with grouped front and rear windows
